content.question: Do Danish school closures' long-term population-decline effects (7.6 percentage points, year 6+ onset) replicate in Hungarian village contexts, or are they specific to Danish housing/labor-market conditions?
content.reduction_path: Conduct a quasi-experimental difference-in-differences analysis of Hungarian village closure events (2010–2020) using migration and census data at the municipality level, with explicit testing of whether population decline emerges as a lagged effect post-closure.
